TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cay-lun Caylun "63 amihca katukuh 121 a mihca" sulit cincung, kuy-yang-cun a tademaw "aydaay hu-nan-lay-yang atademaw" mikingkiw cunida tu tatipeluk nu nalimaan, malakalak kunipi yalaw tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk, u pudac nu kilang malepiay a dawa, muwa atu salil, widaan namin nikaiyan tu cacanan hamin han nida micukaymas, muselep tu aca nu tatipeluk, u pudac nu lilang melmelen hida u nuli sapaduhepic, pacakat tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk mulahat tu dadan, sisa pangangan han nu tapang itawya tu lungtinhu han. sumamadśó©ŚĻī Cay-lun nilecuhan 63 a mihcaan, nay i han-min-ti yun-pin "75amihcaan" culculan nu tapang pataydan i niyadu' nida matusiyam mala adidiay a tay-cin, litian micumud i tapang, itawya sabaw tusa ku mihcaan nuda. . han-cang-ti sayaway patideng sa, mala misimaway tu takuliyaway a panan. Han atu ti kasenun sa malatapang nudikudan sa, macakat tu tebanay a cacuculan, milab utu kakawaw nu kanatal mikawaw tu tabakiay. " nudikuda a cuda. U huwance li cuwan" sakamusa tu ci Caylun nan, utatengaay nami nanamay sa, mala sakakaay u maniketay sa, mikawa masadep masinanut kukawaw "idaw ku ninanaman, masinanut" kinapina makaadih tu kaedes nu tapang yu milubang tu kawaw matineng tu kakawaw "anu patelac maniket ku wayway, caay kautiih". śĒĻŤČĮśäÄŤ°ď Nadikudan sa, ci Caylun mala sang-huwan-ling, mikantukay tu cacanan nu tapang a masangaay a tuud. Imahini sakamu sa ku tademaw, ci Caylun malingatu mitepal tu tung-han sakapahay a nalimaan, musumad tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk. nadikudan sa idaw ku nikiluku tu, nanu mukasi, ucuda sapisinga tu nu auk anisulitan, nadikudan sa thecal ku dawmiay a sapicikcik, nika nicikcikan kasaetiman matekes ku tatipeluk, u auk a nisulitan sa sabaeket sa, kyu ci Caylun pataayaw aca tu nalumaan misabaluhay, sumad han nida tu pudac nu kilang, malepiay nu dawa, matu atu salil u dawmiay a sapisanga tu tatipeluk, tabaki kunipiselep tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk nu sapaaca, patelah tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk. nadikudan sa idaw ku nikiluku tu, nanu mukasi, ucuda sapisinga tu nu auk anisulitan, nadikudan sa thecal ku dawmiay a sapicikcik, nika nicikcikan kasaetiman matekes ku tatipeluk, u auk a nisulitan sa sabaeket sa, kyu ci Caylun pataayaw aca tu nalumaan misabaluhay, sumad han nida tu pudac nu kilang, malepiay nu dawa, matu atu salil u dawmiay a sapisanga tu tatipeluk, tabaki kunipiselep tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk nu sapaaca, patelah tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk. Hanhanti- yinsin amihcaan "105 a mihcaan" ci Caylun sumaden nida ku sapi sanga tu tatipeluk nu nalimaan idaw t uku heci sapakatinenh tu hunti, u hunti maseneng ci Caylun nan, ya nisumadan tu tatipeluk a nalimaan hamin han pakatineng tu katuuday palaklak, han-an-ti nu sayaway amihcaan "114a mihcaan"ukanatal pangangan han ci Caylun tu lung-tin-hu, sisa utademaw pangangan han cinida tu "cay-hu a tatipeluk". nadikudan ya kawaw nida tut ay-pu. Nuayaayawan nu sepat amihcaan "117amihcaan", ci han-an-ti mipili' tu matinengay musilemud tu nisulitan, mu culcul ci Caylun a sisikinig tu kawaw. imahini ci Caylun misiki tu nu atu ciyan-pala, itawya pangangan han tu cay-taypu a pacing, lung ting a ciyan-pala, matineng tu naming ku kanatalay. . nadikuda mikingkiw ŚĺĆšłĖÁ†ĒÁ©∂ namakayni ci Caylunan misangaay tu tatipeluk, mitanam tu nilincunsen a tademaw nisangaan sakamu sa, ci Caylun musumad tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk misabaluhay, namaka timulay a kamu nu pudac nu kilang a lalangawan a calilaw. . ci Caylun yu sumamad misanga tu tatipeluk sa "u han-cu kuudip nida" atu hanu pudac nu kilang atu dawa a tatipeluk" nu timilay a kamu nu lalangawan" a tusaay a nalimaan pulungen , hidan u keliw a nalimaan misanga tu tatipeluk, palamel tu pudac nu kilang a nalimaan a zayliw atu tineng, pakaynin I aadupen a zayliw "kayku"sumaden mala mucelakay a sapisanga " u salil, kilang" sapisanga tu tatipeluk, kiya madayum, kapah aca " tatengaay a tatipeluk" nutademaw a ngangan " cay hu a tatipeluk".
S.PHON: ¶aj-r~…ĺun ¶ajr~…ĺun "** amińß ¶a katukuńß *** a mińß ¶a" sur~…ĺit ¶in ¶uŇč, kuj-jaŇč- ¶un a tad…ômaw "ajdaaj ńßu-nan-r~…ĺaj-jaŇč atad…ômaw" mikiŇčkiw ¶unida tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk nu nar~…ĺimaan, mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak kunipi jar~…ĺaw tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, u puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč mar~…ĺ…ôpiaj a dawa, muwa atu sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, widaan namin nikaijan tu ¶a ¶anan ńßamin ńßan nida mi ¶ukajmas, mus…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu a ¶a nu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, u puda ¶ nu r~…ĺir~…ĺaŇč m…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ…ôn ńßida u nur~…ĺi sapaduńß…ôpi ¶, pa ¶akat tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk mur~…ĺańßat tu dadan, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan nu tapaŇč itawja tu r~…ĺuŇčtinńßu ńßan. sumamad** ¶aj-r~…ĺun nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ** a mińß ¶aan, naj i ńßan-min-ti jun-pin "**amińß ¶aan" ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺan nu tapaŇč patajdan i nijadu Ē~ ° nida matusijam mar~…ĺa adidiaj a taj- ¶in, r~…ĺitian mi ¶umud i tapaŇč, itawja sabaw tusa ku mińß ¶aan nuda. . ńßan- ¶aŇč-ti sajawaj patid…ôŇč sa, mar~…ĺa misimawaj tu takur~…ĺijawaj a panan. ńßan atu ti kas…ônun sa mar~…ĺatapaŇč nudikudan sa, ma ¶akat tu t…ôbanaj a ¶a ¶u ¶ur~…ĺan, mir~…ĺab utu kakawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ mikawaw tu tabakiaj. " nudikuda a ¶uda. u ńßuwan ¶…ô r~…ĺi ¶uwan" sakamusa tu ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun nan, utat…ôŇčaaj nami nanamaj sa, mar~…ĺa sakakaaj u manik…ôtaj sa, mikawa masad…ôp masinanut kukawaw "idaw ku ninanaman, masinanut" kinapina makaadińß tu ka…ôd…ôs nu tapaŇč ju mir~…ĺubaŇč tu kawaw matin…ôŇč tu kakawaw "anu pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ manik…ôt ku wajwaj, ¶aaj kautiińß". **** nadikudan sa, ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun mar~…ĺa saŇč-ńßuwan-r~…ĺiŇč, mikantukaj tu ¶a ¶anan nu tapaŇč a masaŇčaaj a tuud. imańßini sakamu sa ku tad…ômaw, ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun mar~…ĺiŇčatu mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu tuŇč-ńßan sakapańßaj a nar~…ĺimaan, musumad tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk. nadikudan sa idaw ku nikir~…ĺuku tu, nanu mukasi, u ¶uda sapisiŇča tu nu auk anisur~…ĺitan, nadikudan sa tńß…ô ¶ar~…ĺ ku dawmiaj a sapi ¶ik ¶ik, nika ni ¶ik ¶ikan kasa…ôtiman mat…ôk…ôs ku tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, u auk a nisur~…ĺitan sa saba…ôk…ôt sa, kju ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun pataajaw a ¶a tu nar~…ĺumaan misabar~…ĺuńßaj, sumad ńßan nida tu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč, mar~…ĺ…ôpiaj nu dawa, matu atu sar~…ĺir~…ĺ u dawmiaj a sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, tabaki kunipis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk nu sapaa ¶a, pat…ôr~…ĺańß tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk. nadikudan sa idaw ku nikir~…ĺuku tu, nanu mukasi, u ¶uda sapisiŇča tu nu auk anisur~…ĺitan, nadikudan sa tńß…ô ¶ar~…ĺ ku dawmiaj a sapi ¶ik ¶ik, nika ni ¶ik ¶ikan kasa…ôtiman mat…ôk…ôs ku tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, u auk a nisur~…ĺitan sa saba…ôk…ôt sa, kju ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun pataajaw a ¶a tu nar~…ĺumaan misabar~…ĺuńßaj, sumad ńßan nida tu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč, mar~…ĺ…ôpiaj nu dawa, matu atu sar~…ĺir~…ĺ u dawmiaj a sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, tabaki kunipis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk nu sapaa ¶a, pat…ôr~…ĺańß tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk. ńßanńßanti- jinsin amińß ¶aan "*** a mińß ¶aan" ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun sumad…ôn nida ku sapi saŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk nu nar~…ĺimaan idaw t uku ńß…ô ¶i sapakatin…ônńß tu ńßunti, u ńßunti mas…ôn…ôŇč ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun nan, ja nisumadan tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk a nar~…ĺimaan ńßamin ńßan pakatin…ôŇč tu katuudaj par~…ĺakr~…ĺak, ńßan-an-ti nu sajawaj amińß ¶aan "***a mińß ¶aan"ukanatar~…ĺ paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun tu r~…ĺuŇč-tin-ńßu, sisa utad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶inida tu " ¶aj-ńßu a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk". nadikudan ja kawaw nida tut aj-pu. nuajaajawan nu s…ôpat amińß ¶aan "***amińß ¶aan", ¶i ńßan-an-ti mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu matin…ôŇčaj musir~…ĺ…ômud tu nisur~…ĺitan, mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun a sisikinig tu kawaw. imańßini ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun misiki tu nu atu ¶ijan-par~…ĺa, itawja paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ¶aj-tajpu a pa ¶iŇč, r~…ĺuŇč tiŇč a ¶ijan-par~…ĺa, matin…ôŇč tu namiŇč ku kanatar~…ĺaj. . nadikuda mikiŇčkiw **** namakajni ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺunan misaŇčaaj tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, mitanam tu nir~…ĺin ¶uns…ôn a tad…ômaw nisaŇčaan sakamu sa, ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun musumad tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk misabar~…ĺuńßaj, namaka timur~…ĺaj a kamu nu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw. . ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun ju sumamad misaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk sa "u ńßan- ¶u kuudip nida" atu ńßanu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč atu dawa a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk" nu timir~…ĺaj a kamu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan" a tusaaj a nar~…ĺimaan pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn , ńßidan u k…ôr~…ĺiw a nar~…ĺimaan misaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč a nar~…ĺimaan a zajr~…ĺiw atu tin…ôŇč, pakajnin i aadup…ôn a zajr~…ĺiw "kajku"sumad…ôn mar~…ĺa mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a sapisaŇča " u sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, kir~…ĺaŇč" sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, kija madajum, kapańß a ¶a " tat…ôŇčaaj a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk" nutad…ômaw a ŇčaŇčan " ¶aj ńßu a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk".
S.FORM: Cay-lun Caylun "63 amihca katukuh 121 a mihca" sulit cincung, kuy-yang-cun a tademaw "aydaay hu-nan-lay-yang atademaw" mikingkiw cunida tu tatipeluk nu nalimaan, malakalak kunipi yalaw tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk, u pudac nu kilang malepiay a dawa, muwa atu salil, widaan namin nikaiyan tu cacanan hamin han nida micukaymas, muselep tu aca nu tatipeluk, u pudac nu lilang melmelen hida u nuli sapaduhepic, pacakat tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk mulahat tu dadan, sisa pangangan han nu tapang itawya tu lungtinhu han. sumamadśó©ŚĻī Cay-lun nilecuhan 63 a mihcaan, nay i han-min-ti yun-pin "75amihcaan" culculan nu tapang pataydan i niyadu' nida matusiyam mala adidiay a tay-cin, litian micumud i tapang, itawya sabaw tusa ku mihcaan nuda. . han-cang-ti sayaway patideng sa, mala misimaway tu takuliyaway a panan. Han atu ti kasenun sa malatapang nudikudan sa, macakat tu tebanay a cacuculan, milab utu kakawaw nu kanatal mikawaw tu tabakiay. " nudikuda a cuda. U huwance li cuwan" sakamusa tu ci Caylun nan, utatengaay nami nanamay sa, mala sakakaay u maniketay sa, mikawa masadep masinanut kukawaw "idaw ku ninanaman, masinanut" kinapina makaadih tu kaedes nu tapang yu milubang tu kawaw matineng tu kakawaw "anu patelac maniket ku wayway, caay kautiih". śĒĻŤČĮśäÄŤ°ď Nadikudan sa, ci Caylun mala sang-huwan-ling, mikantukay tu cacanan nu tapang a masangaay a tuud. Imahini sakamu sa ku tademaw, ci Caylun malingatu mitepal tu tung-han sakapahay a nalimaan, musumad tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk. nadikudan sa idaw ku nikiluku tu, nanu mukasi, ucuda sapisinga tu nu auk anisulitan, nadikudan sa thecal ku dawmiay a sapicikcik, nika nicikcikan kasaetiman matekes ku tatipeluk, u auk a nisulitan sa sabaeket sa, kyu ci Caylun pataayaw aca tu nalumaan misabaluhay, sumad han nida tu pudac nu kilang, malepiay nu dawa, matu atu salil u dawmiay a sapisanga tu tatipeluk, tabaki kunipiselep tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk nu sapaaca, patelah tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk. nadikudan sa idaw ku nikiluku tu, nanu mukasi, ucuda sapisinga tu nu auk anisulitan, nadikudan sa thecal ku dawmiay a sapicikcik, nika nicikcikan kasaetiman matekes ku tatipeluk, u auk a nisulitan sa sabaeket sa, kyu ci Caylun pataayaw aca tu nalumaan misabaluhay, sumad han nida tu pudac nu kilang, malepiay nu dawa, matu atu salil u dawmiay a sapisanga tu tatipeluk, tabaki kunipiselep tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk nu sapaaca, patelah tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk. Hanhanti- yinsin amihcaan "105 a mihcaan" ci Caylun sumaden nida ku sapi sanga tu tatipeluk nu nalimaan idaw t uku heci sapakatinenh tu hunti, u hunti maseneng ci Caylun nan, ya nisumadan tu tatipeluk a nalimaan hamin han pakatineng tu katuuday palaklak, han-an-ti nu sayaway amihcaan "114a mihcaan"ukanatal pangangan han ci Caylun tu lung-tin-hu, sisa utademaw pangangan han cinida tu "cay-hu a tatipeluk". nadikudan ya kawaw nida tut ay-pu. Nuayaayawan nu sepat amihcaan "117amihcaan", ci han-an-ti mipili' tu matinengay musilemud tu nisulitan, mu culcul ci Caylun a sisikinig tu kawaw. imahini ci Caylun misiki tu nu atu ciyan-pala, itawya pangangan han tu cay-taypu a pacing, lung ting a ciyan-pala, matineng tu naming ku kanatalay. . nadikuda mikingkiw ŚĺĆšłĖÁ†ĒÁ©∂ namakayni ci Caylunan misangaay tu tatipeluk, mitanam tu nilincunsen a tademaw nisangaan sakamu sa, ci Caylun musumad tu sapisanga tu tatipeluk misabaluhay, namaka timulay a kamu nu pudac nu kilang a lalangawan a calilaw. . ci Caylun yu sumamad misanga tu tatipeluk sa "u han-cu kuudip nida" atu hanu pudac nu kilang atu dawa a tatipeluk" nu timilay a kamu nu lalangawan" a tusaay a nalimaan pulungen , hidan u keliw a nalimaan misanga tu tatipeluk, palamel tu pudac nu kilang a nalimaan a zayliw atu tineng, pakaynin I aadupen a zayliw "kayku"sumaden mala mucelakay a sapisanga " u salil, kilang" sapisanga tu tatipeluk, kiya madayum, kapah aca " tatengaay a tatipeluk" nutademaw a ngangan " cay hu a tatipeluk".

nisur~…ĺitan sa saba…ôk…ôt sa, kju ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun pataajaw a ¶a tu nar~…ĺumaan misabar~…ĺuńßaj, sumad ńßan nida tu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč, mar~…ĺ…ôpiaj nu dawa, matu atu sar~…ĺir~…ĺ u dawmiaj a sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, tabaki kunipis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk nu sapaa ¶a, pat…ôr~…ĺańß tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk. ńßanńßanti- jinsin amińß ¶aan "*** a mińß ¶aan" ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun sumad…ôn nida ku sapi saŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk nu nar~…ĺimaan idaw t uku ńß…ô ¶i sapakatin…ônńß tu ńßunti, u ńßunti mas…ôn…ôŇč ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun nan, ja nisumadan tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk a nar~…ĺimaan ńßamin ńßan pakatin…ôŇč tu katuudaj par~…ĺakr~…ĺak, ńßan-an-ti nu sajawaj amińß ¶aan "***a mińß ¶aan"ukanatar~…ĺ paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun tu r~…ĺuŇč-tin-ńßu, sisa utad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶inida tu " ¶aj-ńßu a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk". nadikudan ja kawaw nida tut aj-pu. nuajaajawan nu s…ôpat amińß ¶aan "***amińß ¶aan", ¶i ńßan-an-ti mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu matin…ôŇčaj musir~…ĺ…ômud tu nisur~…ĺitan, mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun a sisikinig tu kawaw. imańßini ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun misiki tu nu atu ¶ijan-par~…ĺa, itawja paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ¶aj-tajpu a pa ¶iŇč, r~…ĺuŇč tiŇč a ¶ijan-par~…ĺa, matin…ôŇč tu namiŇč ku kanatar~…ĺaj. . nadikuda mikiŇčkiw **** namakajni ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺunan misaŇčaaj tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, mitanam tu nir~…ĺin ¶uns…ôn a tad…ômaw nisaŇčaan sakamu sa, ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun musumad tu sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk misabar~…ĺuńßaj, namaka timur~…ĺaj a kamu nu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw. . ¶i ¶ajr~…ĺun ju sumamad misaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk sa "u ńßan- ¶u kuudip nida" atu ńßanu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč atu dawa a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk" nu timir~…ĺaj a kamu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan" a tusaaj a nar~…ĺimaan pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn , ńßidan u k…ôr~…ĺiw a nar~…ĺimaan misaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu puda ¶ nu kir~…ĺaŇč a nar~…ĺimaan a zajr~…ĺiw atu tin…ôŇč, pakajnin i aadup…ôn a zajr~…ĺiw "kajku"sumad…ôn mar~…ĺa mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a sapisaŇča " u sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, kir~…ĺaŇč" sapisaŇča tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, kija madajum, kapańß a ¶a " tat…ôŇčaaj a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk" nutad…ômaw a ŇčaŇčan " ¶aj ńßu a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk".
